input.background: Prospective studies on nutrition often require subjects to keep detailed daily dietary logs. In contrast, retrospective studies often rely on recall.
input.question: Which method-dietary logs or retrospective recall-do you believe is more likely to achieve accurate results? Explain your response.

output.answer: Prospective dietary logs are more accurate than retrospective recall. Memory tends to be unreliable.

study_method.description: The method used for collecting dietary data in nutrition studies.

accuracy.description: The accuracy of the results obtained from the dietary data collection method.
